description: A plain candid photograph (no on-image text, seals, or design elements) taken inside a restaurant or hotel dining area with wicker/rattan chairs and tables set with water glasses, mugs and a wooden box. At a table sit two men in conversation: on the left, a younger man wearing a plaid (pink/blue/white check) short-sleeve shirt and a baseball cap, with visible arm tattoos, seen in profile; on the right, an older gray-haired man in a navy blazer over a light blue shirt, listening intently. The image appears to depict a meeting (consistent with reporting around Sen. Chris Van Hollen's meeting with Kilmar Abrego Garcia in El Salvador, the type of imagery Rapid Response 47 recirculates critically). The tweet text contains only a link, so no slogan context is provided.
